overall.description: A slow exploration of a gothic-style circular dormitory room from a video game, featuring stone walls, wooden ceiling beams, bunk beds with blue drapery, and medieval furnishings. The camera pans around the tower room revealing multiple beds, wardrobes, decorative house banners, and an exit door.

scene_state.functional_zone: entry area of gothic dormitory with first bunk bed

agents.ego_description: slowly entering the dormitory and observing the first bunk bed structure with spiral staircase

entered.detail: dark wooden door frame marking the entrance to the room
tall wooden bunk bed with blue canopy curtains and attached spiral staircase
wooden spiral stairs attached to the side of the bunk bed
heavy blue fabric curtains hanging around the bed and windows
gothic stone arch framing the far window

segments.scene_description: The segment begins near the entrance of a gothic dormitory room, showing a wooden door on the left and a tall bunk bed with blue curtains ahead. The camera moves slowly forward, revealing stone walls, a spiral staircase on the bed structure, and soft natural light filtering through arched windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: central dormitory area with multiple beds and windows

events.description: panning right to reveal the second bunk bed and central dressing area between windows

agents.ego_description: turning to survey the right side of the room containing the second bunk bed and white furniture

entered.detail: matching wooden bunk bed with blue curtains positioned against the right wall
white wooden dresser with drawers situated between two arched windows
tall white cabinet with paneled doors in the corner of the room
circular rug with intricate patterns covering the wooden floor center

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right to reveal the central area of the circular tower room, showcasing a second bunk bed with blue drapery, a white dresser between gothic windows, and a tall wardrobe. The first bunk bed moves to the left side of the frame as the view opens to show the room's spacious interior with stone walls and wooden floors.

scene_state.functional_zone: back wall with house banners and exit area

events.description: tilting upward to focus on the illuminated house banners hanging high on the stone wall
lowering view to reveal the exit door, wall mirror, and corner storage shelves

agents.ego_description: examining the decorative banners and wall shelves before focusing on the exit door

entered.detail: vertical blue and gold banner depicting a castle tower hanging from the ceiling
vertical blue and bronze banner with eagle crest next to the first banner
floating wooden shelves holding books and decorative objects
tall oval mirror with white frame mounted on the wall near the exit
arched wooden door with decorative frame leading out of the room
wooden stand with hanging garments near the exit door

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to focus on two large house banners hanging against the stone back wall, then lowers to reveal wall shelves, an oval mirror, and an arched exit door. The bunk beds and dressers exit the frame as the view centers on the decorative elements and exit area of the dormitory.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins at the entrance of a gothic dormitory and pans across its circular interior to focus on the room's decorative exit area. It begins by gliding forward from a wooden door toward a tall bunk bed with blue curtains, where soft natural light filters through arched windows against stone walls. As the camera pans right, the view opens to reveal the spaciousness of the tower room, shifting past a second draped bunk bed and a white dresser positioned between gothic windows. The scene then tilts upward to highlight two large house banners hanging against the back wall before lowering to center on wall shelves and an oval mirror. Finally, the furniture slides out of frame as the camera settles on an arched exit door.
